rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>在那道瀑布对面，
有一片名叫<Color=red>托托湖<Color=white>的小湖泊……
由于这场异变，湖泊附近的悬崖崩塌了。<unk[5:0]>
令人惊讶的是，那里居然出现了古代遗迹！
<unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>希多王子也觉得很有价值，
便派学者<Color=red>基奥托<Color=white>前往那里进行调查……
可基奥托却沉迷于调查遗迹，
一次都没回来报告过卓啦！
<unk[3:0:2]><unk[4:0:16 65 110 103 114 121 95 48 48]>我倒是理解，学者的工作和兴趣分得没那么清，
可最起码得有个度啊！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>瀑布的另一頭
有一座名為<Color=red>托托湖<Color=white>的小湖畔……
而湖畔周圍的崖壁在異變後崩塌了。<unk[5:0]>
但沒想到，那裡居然會出現古代遺跡。
<unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>希多王子認為那一定很重要，
馬上任命學者<Color=red>基奧托<Color=white>前往調查……
但他們卻都沉迷在調查遺跡中，
完全沒有人來回報現況卓啦！
<unk[3:0:2]><unk[4:0:16 65 110 103 114 121 95 48 48]>就算學者的工作就和興趣沒兩樣，
但起碼也要有個限度吧！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>あの<Ruby={2:4}たき>滝の<Ruby={2:2}む>向こうに
<Color=red>トト<Ruby={2:2}こ>湖<Color=white>という <Ruby={2:4}ちい>小さな<Ruby={2:8}みずうみ>湖があるのだが…
<Ruby={4:6}いへん>異変のせいで <Ruby={2:8}みずうみ>湖のほとりの<Ruby={2:4}がけ>崖が<Ruby={2:4}くず>崩れてな<unk[5:0]>
なんと <Ruby={4:6}こだい>古代の<Ruby={4:6}いせき>遺跡が<Ruby={2:2}で>出てきたのだ
<unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>これはと<Ruby={2:4}おも>思った シド<Ruby={4:6}おうじ>王子が
<Ruby={4:8}がくしゃ>学者の<Color=red>ジアート<Color=white>を<Ruby={4:8}ちょうさ>調査に<Ruby={2:2}さ>差し<Ruby={2:2}む>向けたのはいいが…
<Ruby={4:6}いせき>遺跡いじりに<Ruby={4:8}むちゅう>夢中で
<Ruby={4:8}ほうこく>報告ひとつ<Ruby={2:2}よ>寄こさんゾラ！
<unk[3:0:2]><unk[4:0:16 65 110 103 114 121 95 48 48]><Ruby={4:6}しごと>仕事と<Ruby={4:6}しゅみ>趣味の<Ruby={2:6}さかい>境がないのが<Ruby={4:8}がくしゃ>学者とはいえ
<Ruby={6:12}ひじょうしき>非常識にも<Ruby={2:4}ほど>程がありすぎる！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>The cliffs at the <Color=red>shore of Toto Lake<Color=white>
crumbled due to the Upheaval.<unk[5:0]>

Miraculously, an ancient ruin appeared.


<unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>I am pleased that Prince Sidon asked the
Zora historian, <Color=red>Jiahto<Color=white>, to investigate.

However, he is far too interested in
satisfying his curiosity for those ruins and
simply will not provide us with a report!
<unk[3:0:2]><unk[4:0:16 65 110 103 114 121 95 48 48]>I understand that historians believe theirs
is a labor of passion, but sometimes that
perspective is downright impractical!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:2]><unk[4:0:18 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83]>我受王子之命，要将结果整理起来报告上去，
真希望他能理解一下我现在这焦急的心情卓啦！

<unk[3:0:2]><unk[4:0:18 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83]>我受王子之命，要將結果整理後稟告上去，

a summary of the results and a full report.
I wish Jiahto knew how frustrated I am!

<unk[3:0:260]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 77 95 48 48]>なに…<unk[5:0]> <Color=red>トト<Ruby={2:2}こ>湖<Color=white>の<Ruby={4:6}せきひ>石碑の<Ruby={4:4}もじ>文字が<Ruby={2:2}よ>読めた！？<unk[5:1]>

So? What was written? <unk[5:0]>No... Hold!


<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>I am grateful for your kindness, but it is
Jiahto's duty alone to submit his report
to me.
<unk[3:0:258]><unk[4:0:16 65 110 103 114 121 95 48 49]>I cannot believe he has left it up to a
Hylian to report on the investigation.
Honestly!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>托托湖的石碑上的文字居然解读出来了……<unk[5:0]>

我会在这里等待他的报告卓啦！

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>It is truly incredible that you were able to
read the message on the stone slate at
Toto Lake. I deeply respect your prowess.
<unk[3:0:9]><unk[4:0:16 65 110 103 114 121 95 48 48]>However, it is only appropriate for Jiahto
himself to provide the report. I shall wait
here for him to fulfill his duty!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>米法大人伫立在月光下的画作……<unk[5:1]>
真是令人叹为观止卓啦。
我也要挑战一下新鲜的事物卓啦……！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>佇立在月光下的米法大人的畫作……<unk[5:1]>
真是令人嘆為觀止卓啦。
我也來挑戰一些新事物卓啦……！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]><Ruby={4:6}げっか>月下にたたずむ ミファー<Ruby={2:4}さま>様の<Ruby={2:2}え>絵…<unk[5:1]>
あの<Ruby={4:6}かいが>絵画には <Ruby={4:8}かんぷく>感服したゾラ
ワシも <Ruby={2:6}あたら>新しい<Ruby={2:4}こと>事に<Ruby={4:10}ちょうせん>挑戦するゾラ…！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]>That picture of Princess Mipha standing
in the moonlight...<unk[5:1]> I am greatly impressed
by your drawing skills.
Witnessing your many talents encourages
me to continue challenging myself in
new ways.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>看了你那张画之后，我受到启发，
决定开始练习绘画了卓啦。
看到米法大人的画时涌出的感动……<unk[5:1]>
就连我这个老兵也感到无比新鲜卓啦。
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 76]>只要坚持练习绘画100年左右，
我的画工一定能超越你吧卓啦！哈哈哈！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>我看了你那張圖後，
決定開始練習畫圖了卓啦。
當我看到那幅米法大人畫作時湧出的感動……<unk[5:1]>
就連我這個老兵也感到新奇卓啦。
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 76]>只要我持續練習100年左右的話，
畫功一定能超越你卓啦！哈哈哈！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>お<Ruby={2:4}ぬし>主に<Ruby={2:2}み>見せられた<Ruby={2:2}え>絵に <Ruby={4:10}しょくはつ>触発されて<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={4:6}かいが>絵画を<Ruby={4:10}れんしゅう>練習する<Ruby={2:4}こと>事にしたゾラ
ミファー<Ruby={2:4}さま>様の<Ruby={2:2}え>絵を<Ruby={2:2}み>見た<Ruby={2:4}とき>時の <Ruby={4:8}かんどう>感動たるや…<unk[5:1]>
この<Ruby={4:8}ろうへい>老兵にも まっこと<Ruby={4:8}しんせん>新鮮であったゾラ
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 76]>あと100<Ruby={2:4}ねん>年ほど <Ruby={4:10}れんしゅう>練習を<Ruby={2:4}つづ>続ければ
お<Ruby={2:4}ぬし>主の<Ruby={2:2}え>絵を<Ruby={2:2}こ>超えるゾラな！ <unk[5:1]>ハッハッハ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>I was inspired by the painting you showed
me and decided to practice the art myself!

Maybe it was the rush of emotion I felt
when seeing Princess Mipha's picture...<unk[5:1]>
It was refreshing for this old warrior.
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 76]>If I keep training for 100 years or so,
perhaps even I, Seggin, can surpass your
mighty drawing skill! Ha, imagine that!

rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:261]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>那幅米法大人的畫作帶給我的感動……
我總有一天要畫出能超越那幅畫的作品卓啦！
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 49]>為了這項目標，<unk[5:0]>
我要每天練習！哈哈哈！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:261]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>いつか あの ミファー<Ruby={2:4}さま>様の<Ruby={2:2}え>絵を
<Ruby={2:2}み>見た<Ruby={2:4}とき>時の<Ruby={4:8}かんどう>感動を <Ruby={2:2}こ>超えるものを<Ruby={2:2}か>描いてやるゾラ
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 49]>そのためには <Ruby={8:12}ひびたんれん>日々鍛錬！<unk[5:0]>
ハッハッハ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:261]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>One fine day, I will paint a picture that
evokes even more emotion than that
lovely one of Princess Mipha.
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 49]>And to do that...I must train harder than
ever every day!<unk[5:0]> Ha ha ha!
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:12 87 97 107 101 117 112]>I must give in to sleep soon.
